nodes.label: Architectural Findings and Existing Prototype Analysis
nodes.norm_label: architectural findings and existing prototype analysis

nodes.label: Venture-Scale Prediction Market Architecture Task Plan
nodes.norm_label: venture-scale prediction market architecture task plan

nodes.label: 99-Price-Bucket Optimization Concept
nodes.rationale: Discrete price cents allow static bucket array, reducing order operations from O(log N) tree traversal to O(1) in-memory array access.

nodes.label: Synthetic Order Matching Mechanism
nodes.rationale: Combines YES Buy and NO Buy orders at prices summing to >= $1.00 to mint contract and issue shares, eliminating cross-market arbitrage.

nodes.label: Decoupled Event-Driven Pipeline Strategy
nodes.rationale: Decouples low-latency in-memory matching thread from slow disk writes (PostgreSQL) using Kafka and Redis.

nodes.label: Siloed Channel Architecture
nodes.rationale: Isolated sync.RWMutex per MarketBook combined with Actor Model goroutine per market bypasses global lock contention.

nodes.label: Time-Weighted Pari-Mutuel Formulation
nodes.rationale: Uses a square root decay function to calculate bet weights, incentivizing early price discovery and countering late-stage information advantages.

nodes.label: Central Limit Order Book Engine Concept
nodes.norm_label: central limit order book engine concept

nodes.label: Hybrid Liquidity Model
nodes.rationale: Pairs CLOB/AMM for mainstream, high-volume trading and TWPM for long-tail, low-liquidity custom user markets.
